nodes.name: 📅 Monday 9 AM PHT
nodes.notes:
Fires every Monday at 9:00 AM PHT.
Weekly cadence to avoid spamming potential sponsors.
Day 1 of the work week = best time for B2B outreach opens.

nodes.name: 📊 Read All Analytics
nodes.notes: Reads all analytics data to compute lifetime stats for the media kit.

nodes.name: 📈 Compute Media Kit Stats
nodes.notes:
Computes lifetime analytics for the media kit:
total views, avg views/video, engagement rate, viral rate,
top platform, 30-day views, and videos published.

nodes.name: 🔀 Has Analytics?
nodes.notes: Only proceeds if there's analytics data. Skips brand outreach if no content has been published yet.

nodes.name: 🎯 Get Pending Leads
nodes.notes:
Reads leads with Status = 'Pending' from the 'Brand Leads' sheet tab.
Create this tab with columns:
Brand Name | Contact Email | Category | Website | Notes | Status | Last Contacted

Add leads manually or via scraping. Status values:
Pending → Emailed → Replied → Closed → Rejected

values.content:
You are a professional brand partnership outreach specialist for a gaming content creator. Write a personalized sponsorship pitch email.

Tone: Professional but Gen-Z aware. Confident, not desperate. Data-driven.
Length: 150-200 words max.
Format: Subject line on first line, then blank line, then email body.

Include:
1. A hook referencing something specific about the brand
2. Quick creator stats (from the media kit data)
3. A specific collaboration idea tailored to the brand
4. A soft CTA ("Would love to explore this")
5. Sign off as the creator

Do NOT include fake testimonials or inflated numbers. Use only the stats provided.

nodes.name: 🧠 Generate Pitch Email
nodes.notes:
Generates a personalized sponsorship pitch email for each brand lead.
Uses real analytics data — no inflation.
Subject line is the first line of the response.

nodes.name: 📋 Parse Email
nodes.notes: Separates the subject line from the email body for the Gmail send node.

nodes.name: 📱 Send for Review
nodes.notes:
HUMAN IN THE LOOP — Sends the draft pitch to Telegram for your review.
The email is NOT auto-sent. You review, edit, then manually send or
trigger a send via a separate approval workflow.
This prevents embarrassing auto-sent emails with wrong data.

nodes.name: 📊 Update Lead Status
nodes.notes:
Updates the brand lead's status to 'Draft Sent' and logs the contact date.
After you manually send the email, update to 'Emailed' in the sheet.

parameters.text:
=⏩ *DEALMAKER SKIPPED*
📅 {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

No analytics data yet. Publish content first, then the Dealmaker will generate brand pitches with real stats.

Target: 14+ published videos before starting outreach.

nodes.name: 📱 No Data Yet
nodes.notes: Notifies you if the Dealmaker can't run because no analytics data exists yet.
